fields.description: DN debits this (outgoing stock); PR credits this (incoming stock). Used when is_bns_internal_customer/supplier.
fields.label: Stock in Transit Account

fields.description: SI uses this account for inter-state internal sales GL rewrite (GST-bearing, appears on GSTR-1).
fields.label: Internal Sales Transfer Account (GST / Inter-State)

fields.description: DN uses this account for same-GSTIN internal sales GL rewrite (non-GST, does not appear on GSTR-1). Leave blank to fall back to the GST/Inter-State account above.
fields.label: Internal Sales Transfer Account (Non-GST / Same-GSTIN)

fields.description: PI uses this account for inter-state internal purchase GL rewrite (GST-bearing, appears on GSTR-2).
fields.label: Internal Purchase Transfer Account (GST / Inter-State)

fields.description: PR uses this account for same-GSTIN internal purchase GL rewrite (non-GST, does not appear on GSTR-2). Leave blank to fall back to the GST/Inter-State account above.
fields.label: Internal Purchase Transfer Account (Non-GST / Same-GSTIN)

fields.description: SI credits this instead of income account; PI debits this instead of expense account when is_bns_internal.
fields.label: Internal Transfer Account

fields.description: SI debits this (receivable from branch); PI credits this (payable to branch). Net balance = inter-branch position.
fields.label: Internal Branch Debtor Account

fields.description: PR debits this (payable from source branch) when BNS internal DN->PR GL rewrite is applied.
fields.label: Internal Branch Creditor Account

fields.description: Force BNS internal GL rewrite even when strict source checks are partially missing. Use only for controlled recovery.
fields.label: Force BNS Internal GL Rewrite

fields.description: Deprecated. Migrated to Fiscal Year based cutoff fields below.
fields.label: Internal Validation Cutoff Date

fields.description: BNS internal transfer status, flags, and linking apply from the start of this fiscal year. Leave empty to disable all BNS internal logic.
fields.label: Internal Transfer Cutoff

fields.description: GL/SLE rewriting and transfer rate sync apply from the start of this fiscal year. Must be same or later than Internal Transfer Cutoff.
fields.label: Accounting Rewrite Cutoff

fields.description: Maximum acceptable amount difference (per line item taxable value, grand total, and total taxes) between source Sales Invoice and Purchase Invoice. Differences below this threshold are ignored during SI-PI parity validation. Set 0 for exact match.
fields.label: SI-PI Amount Tolerance

fields.description: Allow Delivery Note to Purchase Receipt direct conversion even when company GSTIN and billing GSTIN differ. When enabled, diff-GSTIN DN/PR flows through the same-GSTIN code path: PR is linked via bns_inter_company_reference, status becomes BNS Internally Transferred, and GL rewrite uses Internal Branch Debtor/Creditor + Sales/Purchase Transfer accounts. Compliance note: inter-state goods movement without a Sales Invoice is allowed under GST only for delivery-challan use cases (own-use stock transfer, job work, etc.). Toggle off for normal operation.
fields.label: Allow Different GSTIN DN → PR

fields.description: Auto-generate e-Waybill for Delivery Notes when customer is BNS internal and billing GSTIN equals company GSTIN.
fields.label: Auto e-Waybill for Internal Customer DN
